bounded_regeneration_design_records.design_description_bucket: regeneration requires explicit opt-in via private-root argument. no implicit private root enumeration. no traversal outside explicitly supplied project-private root buckets or temporary private output buckets.

regenerate FD1 private decomposition rows by replaying the FD1 decomposition under explicit opt-in. produces private rows in a temporary private output bucket only; public artifact carries manifest count buckets only. no raw rows published.

regenerate P4L private arm-outcome rows by replaying the frozen P4 scheduler on the locked denominator under explicit opt-in. produces private arm-outcome rows in a temporary private output bucket only; public artifact carries manifest count buckets only.

regenerate N10EO private diagnostic rerun by replaying the diagnostic under explicit opt-in. produces private diagnostic rows in a temporary private output bucket only; public artifact carries aggregate mechanism buckets only.

regenerate N10ER public CI safety probe by replaying the bounded public CI canary under explicit opt-in with network enabled. produces public aggregate report; private rows stay in runner-private output buckets.

coverage_gap_records.gap_description_bucket: group task_identity was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
coverage_gap_records.group_description_bucket: anonymous task identity: anonymous_task_id, repo_bucket, language_bucket.

group candidate_pool was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
group rank_pack was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
group span_projection was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
group scheduler_action was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
group evidence_core was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
group arm_assignment was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
group outcome_metric was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
coverage_gap_records.group_description_bucket: outcome metric aggregate buckets: citation_validity_bucket, file_recovery_topk_bucket, lost_baseline_top10_bucket.

coverage_gap_records.gap_description_bucket: group safety_probe_signal was not_present in HAAE-R1 (no explicit private roots). 1 source option(s) identified with public_evidence_strong=True, public_evidence_partial=False.
coverage_gap_records.group_description_bucket: safety-probe signal aggregate buckets: full_guard_diffaware_loss_bucket, risk_bucket_signal.

option_decision_records.decision_description_bucket: source lock passes, HAAE-R1 unavailable/no roots confirmed, HAAE-R2 false, all 10 groups accounted, at least one source option public_evidence_strong/partial. authorize only HAAE-R1B Bounded Private Trace Root Regeneration Preflight Package (design-only).

phase_bucket: BEA-v1-HAAE-R1A Private Trace Coverage Gap Design

public_input_records.input_description_bucket: the HAAE-R1 feasibility inventory report confirming all 10 groups not_present.
the HAAE-R0 schema preflight report designing the 10 schema groups.
the N10ET close-out design/decision authorizing HAAE-R0.
FD1 failure decomposition: 86040 private decomposition rows, 239 composite record groups (private manifest only).
P4L locked non-Python scheduler validation: 272-record denominator, 1088 private arm-outcome rows (private manifest only).
N1 frozen P4 span refiner smoke: rank-blocked denominator, span-opportunity.
N2 rank/pack actionability decomposition: 40 rank-blocked records, extra-depth append blocked.
N10EO difference-aware CI regression failure analysis: mechanism buckets, novelty buckets.
N10ER bounded public CI score/guard safety probe: 80/60/40 sample, arm aggregates, risk bucket.
N10ES public safety probe audit package: locked N10ER aggregates.
N10EM difference-aware winner public replication package: 13/16/20/26 chain.
N10EN difference-aware CI canary: 4 arms, baseline/full/guard/diffaware.

risk_control_records.mitigation_bucket: HAAE-R1A publishes aggregate buckets only; forbidden_scan blocks raw diagnostic keys, private root location values, file extensions in values, hashes, and CI/task/record ids; every record carries aggregate_buckets_only_bool=true, no_raw_release_bool=true.
risk_control_records.risk_description_bucket: the coverage gap design could leak raw diagnostic value categories into the public artifact.

risk_control_records.mitigation_bucket: every record carries design_only_bool=true, execution_authorized_bool=false, no_root_regeneration_in_r1a_bool=true; stop/go carries haae_r1b_execution_authorized_bool=false.
risk_control_records.risk_description_bucket: HAAE-R1A could be scoped beyond a design into root regeneration/replay/scoring/retrieval/candidate generation/HAAE-layer execution.

risk_control_records.mitigation_bucket: every record carries the HAAE-R0 non-identity booleans; selector_reranker_authorized_bool=false; bea_v1_a_authorized_bool=false; p5_authorized_bool=false; runtime_default_change_authorized_bool=false.
risk_control_records.risk_description_bucket: the coverage gap design could be reframed as BEA-v1-A, a selector-only design, selector/reranker execution, P5, or a runtime/default promotion.

risk_control_records.mitigation_bucket: stop/go carries haae_r1b_design_only_bool=true, haae_r1b_execution_authorized_bool=false, haae_r1b_private_read_authorized_bool=false, haae_r1b_replay_authorized_bool=false, etc.
risk_control_records.risk_description_bucket: the pass handoff could over-authorize HAAE-R1B beyond a design-only preflight into execution/private reads.

risk_control_records.mitigation_bucket: runtime_default_change_authorized_bool=false; any HAAE route remains opt-in/eval-only; no runtime or default change.
risk_control_records.risk_description_bucket: the coverage gap design could implicitly drift runtime/default behavior by codifying a route as a default gate.

risk_control_records.mitigation_bucket: method_winner_claim_authorized_bool=false; guard_full_diffaware_promotion_authorized_bool=false; the design authorizes only HAAE-R1B preflight or closeout, not any promotion or rule change.
risk_control_records.risk_description_bucket: the coverage gap (all 10 groups not_present) could be overinterpreted as a method-winner or promotion claim.

root_manifest_schema_design_records.schema_field_description_bucket: anonymous identifier for each private root bucket. no raw paths.
whether the root was present and enumerable.
bucketized file count (count_0, count_1_to_10, count_11_to_100, count_101_to_1000, count_1001_plus). no raw file counts.
bucketized extension distribution (ext_jsonl, ext_json, ext_csv, ext_other). no filenames.
which schema groups are populated by this root (full/sufficient/partial/missing/not_present).
explicit false for raw release; always true (no raw release).

root_source_option_records.source_description_bucket: FD1 private decomposition manifest records 86040 private decomposition rows across 239 composite record groups. N10ER/N10ES public aggregates carry task_count (80/60/40). Strong evidence that task_identity can be populated from FD1 private decomposition + N10ER public aggregates.

N10DW normalized BM25 recovery mechanism analysis and N10DZ/N10EA expanded canary packages carry anchor_kind and acquisition_cost buckets. Partial evidence: anchor_kind is derivable from the normalized BM25 mechanism classification.

N10EO private diagnostic rerun carries mechanism buckets (novel_first_displaced, candidate_available_beyond_top10) and novelty bucket diagnostics. N10EF/N10EI/N10EG carry candidate_count and depth_distribution buckets. Strong evidence.

N2 rank/pack actionability decomposition carries topk_pack and novel_vs_old_pool buckets across 40 rank-blocked records. N1 carries rank-blocked denominator. N10EJ/N10EK/N10EL carry difference-aware rank/pack buckets. Strong evidence.
The N10AA-N10BN span window repair branch carries span_window and span_overlap buckets across many sub-phases. N1 carries span refiner smoke. Strong evidence from the span-window repair lineage.

P4L private arm-outcome manifest records 1088 private arm-outcome rows across a 272-record non-Python denominator with 5 arms. The scheduler action and action_cost buckets are directly derivable. Strong evidence.
FD1 private decomposition carries EvidenceCore evidence-shape aggregate buckets. N10ER carries citation-validity aggregates. N10ES audits the citation aggregate. Strong evidence.

P4L records 1088 private arm-outcome rows with 5 arms (BM25_same_budget, RRF_same_budget, BEA_v0.3_frozen, V1_sched_span, V1_sched_span_rank). N10EM/N10EN/N10ER carry arm_assignment buckets. Strong evidence.

N10ER carries arm aggregates (37/39/40/40 baseline, 36/39/40/40 full, 38/39/40/40 guard, 37/39/40/40 diffaware), citation validity (7772/7772), and lost_baseline_top10. N10ES audits all. N10EO carries mechanism buckets. Strong evidence.

N10EQ designed the safety probe features. N10ER ran the probe (risk bucket task_count=26, losses 0/0/0). N10ES audited it. N10ET closed the branch. The full_guard_diffaware_loss and risk_bucket_signal buckets are carried. Strong evidence.

source_lock_records.locked_haae_r1_next_allowed_phase: BEA-v1-HAAE-R1A Private Trace Coverage Gap Design

stop_go_records.next_allowed_phase: BEA-v1-HAAE-R1B Bounded Private Trace Root Regeneration Preflight Package
